text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huff, puff, huff, puff...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Doto. You can take a break over
there. I'm going to go for another run.

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Huh?! O-Opera O, you still have e-energy?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ha ha ha! I recognize all of my lovely costars for
the outstandingly gifted people they are.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: But I cannot expect a leading role to just fall out of the sky and land in my lap.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I must go all in, overcome the fearsome mountain
summits, and take the helm.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And that attitude alone proves that I am truly the
Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text: Opera O...

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha! And so, I shall begin! The Satsuki
Sho isn't far off, you know.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff... Phew.
Ah! Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Welcome back! Hehe, I heard you went for a jog,
so I waited here.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What for?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I have something to ask you! It's about tomorrow.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Would you like to go running together?

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text: Oh, it's Top Road... and Ayabe!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text:
Are they about to run together? I've gotta see
this!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student B
text_block_list.text:
I've always thought Ayabe is so cool and naturally
gifted!

text_block_list.name: Younger Student A
text_block_list.text:
But Top Road has been doing amazing lately! Do
you know what that means?!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: All right. Shall we get started?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Sure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Admire Vega and Narita Top Road begin their run
together.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road is the first to take the lead.
Admire Vega maintains her place behind her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being particularly skilled at accelerating, Admire
Vega normally cuts loose on the final stretch,
overcoming her competition. However...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Ngh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Top Road makes an early sprint for the
finish, and Admire Vega is unable to catch up.

text_block_list.name: Ayabe and Top Road
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant, pant...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I did it... I did it!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...You sure are in a good mood.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh. Hehe... I'm sorry.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: But... I really am happy, honest!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Ayabe... I want to beat you.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I've come this far all because of that.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...What?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I've done my research! Your sudden burst in
speed down the homestretch is incredible...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
So I thought, how can I keep myself from getting
caught off guard? What can I do to win?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Ever since, I've been working on my tenacity to
make sure my legs never give out, no matter how
hard I push.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I really... really wanted to beat you, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I... don't understand.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Why me?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Oh, well... umm...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Do you have any plans after this?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Let me get you something to eat as thanks for
running with me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I think I'll go with the carrot hamburger
steak meal after all.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
No matter how big the menu is, I always end up
ordering what I did last time.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: ...I hear that often.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Opera O is always trying new things when she eats
out though, haha!

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: What are you going to get?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: A steamed chicken salad.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Okay, a steamed chicken salad and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Wait... only a salad?! You don't have to be so
modest!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: It's fine... Besides, we came here to talk.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Hehe, that's right.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: So, the reason I'm so fixated on you...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: Is because I respect you.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Respect?

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'm always thinking how important it is to live up
to people's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Knowing that there are people that support me
and want to see me win makes me happy... and
very proud.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
The more I think about how much I want to meet
everyone's expectations, sometimes...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I can feel my legs trembling when they cheer.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
And then... I sometimes can't achieve what
everyone had hoped for.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
But after talking with you and seeing you run in
the Hopeful Stakes, I was able to understand.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
Even if the pressure gets to me and I'm afraid to
let everyone down...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I will make everyone proud, no matter what. As long as I haven't given up, my legs will keep moving forward.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: That's something you taught me.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I've made up my mind, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text:
I'll win the Triple Crown. That's how I'll live up to
everyone's expectations.

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: I'll start with the Satsuki Sho...

text_block_list.name: Narita Top Road
text_block_list.text: And defeat you—the person I respect so much.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (At that moment...)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (I felt pierced by her honest eyes.)

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: (My cheeks were tingling.)
Ayabe?
